mapper.sql: id,daily_id,date, shop_id,platform_id,region_id, sku_id,sku_code,goods_name, sku_name,order_total,order_amount, false_order_total,false_order_amount,false_order_amount1, true_order_total,true_order_amount,ad_fee, ad_click,ad_click_fee,ad_roi, unit_price,create_time,create_by, update_time,update_by
mapper.select: SELECT sku.id,sku.goods_name,sku.sku_code,sku.sku_name,sku.color_image, IFNULL((select SUM(order_amount) from o_shop_daily_detail as d where d.sku_id=sku.id and d.region_id=#{regionId} and d.date >= #{startDate} and d.date <= #{endDate}),0) as order_amount, IFNULL((select SUM(order_total) from o_shop_daily_detail as d where d.sku_id=sku.id and d.region_id=#{regionId} and d.date >= #{startDate} and d.date <= #{endDate}),0) as order_total, IFNULL((select SUM(ad_fee) from o_shop_daily_detail as d where d.sku_id=sku.id and d.region_id=#{regionId} and d.date >= #{startDate} and d.date <= #{endDate}),0) as ad_fee, IFNULL((select SUM(false_order_amount) from o_shop_daily_detail as d where d.sku_id=sku.id and d.region_id=#{regionId} and d.date >= #{startDate} and d.date <= #{endDate}),0) as false_order_amount, IFNULL((select SUM(false_order_total) from o_shop_daily_detail as d where d.sku_id=sku.id and d.region_id=#{regionId} and d.date >= #{startDate} and d.date <= #{endDate}),0) as false_order_total, (SELECT exchange_rate FROM o_shop_region WHERE id=#{regionId}) as exchange_rate FROM `o_goods_sku` as sku
